title: Pack N Trade 8 Inch Square Cake Boards – Pack of 5 Double Thick 3mm Cardboard, Foil-Finished Both Sides, Reusable & Sturdy Cake Base for Baking, Decorating, and Display
features: 【Premium Double Thickness】Crafted with 3mm thick premium cake board square, these boards provide a sturdy base for all cake types, ensuring stability during transport and display.
【Elegant Foil Finish】Featuring a foil finish on both sides, these cake cards boards add a touch of sophistication to your cake presentations while offering moisture resistance.
【Reusable & Durable】Designed for multiple uses, these boards maintain their shape and appearance, making them a cost-effective choice for both home bakers and professionals.
【Perfect Size for Versatility】Measuring 8 inches (20 x 20 cm), these square boards are ideal for various cake sizes and styles, from single-layer to multi-tiered creations.
【Enhances Cake Presentation】The sleek design and sturdy construction not only support your cakes but also enhance their overall presentation, making them stand out on Christmas & any occasion.
